creator: alonsoschaich@fastmail.fm
text:
Created attachment 223684
upgrade to 1.2.1

json-yaml has released version 1.2 and 1.2.1 which are not in the port tree yet. Most notoriously, the yaml-json binary was introduced, which generates json out of yaml.

The attached patch upgrades the ports collection's json-yaml to release 1.2.1
